synopsis: Rogue One introduced two dynamic partners to the Rebel Alliance: a morally grey spy who will do whatever it takes to get the job done and a former imperial spy Droid who says wherever is on his mind without a second thought about how his painfully honest remarks will be received. This comic is the story of how their partnership began. Looking forward to the new Cassian and K2 Disney+ TV show? Start here!
title: Rogue One - Cassian & K-2SO Special 1
